allow: Bash(node -e "process.stdin.resume\(\); let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ const j=JSON.parse\(d\); if\(j.error\) { console.log\('error:', JSON.stringify\(j.error\)\); return; } console.log\('keys:', Object.keys\(j\)\); if\(j.items\) console.log\('count:', j.count, 'sample:', JSON.stringify\(j.items[0]\).slice\(0,300\)\); }\);")

Bash(node -e 'process.stdin.resume\(\); let d='\\'''\\''; process.stdin.on\('\\''data'\\'',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('\\''end'\\'',\(\)=>{ const j=JSON.parse\(d\); const status=j.status; const score=j.score; const stats=j.statistics; console.log\('\\''status keys:'\\'', Object.keys\(status||{}\)\); console.log\('\\''score keys:'\\'', Object.keys\(score||{}\)\); console.log\('\\''stats keys:'\\'', Object.keys\(stats||{}\)\); if\(status&&!status['\\''$ref'\\'']\){ console.log\('\\''position:'\\'', JSON.stringify\(status.position\)\); } if\(score&&!score['\\''$ref'\\'']\){ console.log\('\\''score:'\\'', score.displayValue\); } }\);')

Bash(node -e "process.stdin.resume\(\); let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ const j=JSON.parse\(d\); const stats=j.splits?.categories?.[0]?.stats; if\(stats\) stats.forEach\(s=>{ if\(['scoreToPar','regScore','amount','cupPoints','position'].includes\(s.name\)\) console.log\(s.name, s.value, s.displayValue\); }\); }\);")
